plugins.name: Browser Use
plugins.description: Provides Electron browser automation tools for page state, real input, uploads, screenshots, and text extraction.

zh-CN.name: 浏览器自动化
zh-CN.description: 提供 Electron 浏览器自动化工具，支持页面状态读取、真实输入、文件上传、截图和文本提取。

plugins.name: Computer Use
plugins.description: Provides native desktop control tools including screenshots, mouse, keyboard, shortcuts, scrolling, and waiting.

zh-CN.name: 电脑控制
zh-CN.description: 提供原生桌面控制工具，包括截图、鼠标、键盘、快捷键、滚动和等待。

plugins.name: Fish Audio S2 Emotion Enhancer
plugins.description: Adds controlled voice cue rules for Fish Audio S2 models and hides TTS control tags from display and memory.

zh-CN.name: Fish Audio S2 情绪增强
zh-CN.description: 为 Fish Audio S2 模型加入受控语音提示规则，并从展示和记忆中隐藏 TTS 控制标签。

plugins.name: Live2D Avatar
plugins.description: Loads a configurable Live2D Cubism avatar and maps Noema state updates to motions, expressions, pose, and lip sync.

zh-CN.name: Live2D 形象
zh-CN.description: 加载可配置的 Live2D Cubism 形象，并将 Noema 状态映射到动作、表情、姿态和口型同步。

plugins.name: MCP Manager
plugins.description: Connects and schedules MCP servers during task runtime.

zh-CN.name: MCP 管理器
zh-CN.description: 在任务运行时连接并调度 MCP 服务器。

plugins.name: Skills Manager
plugins.description: Manages and retrieves local Skills during task runtime.

zh-CN.name: Skills 管理器
zh-CN.description: 在任务运行时管理并检索本地 Skills。

plugins.name: Sticker Expression
plugins.description: Displays stickers based on emotion tags in replies.

zh-CN.name: 贴纸表情
zh-CN.description: 根据回复中的情绪标签展示贴纸表情。
